title: Show full x-axis even if there is no data
excerpt: I have a bar chart that shows a frequency distribution by calendar week. Obviously some weeks might not be represented, but I still want to have all 52 weeks distributed across the x-axis. Is there a way to do this?

posts.author: neilfry (Neil)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a bar chart that shows a frequency distribution by calendar week. Obviously some weeks might not be represented, but I still want to have all 52 weeks distributed across the x-axis. Is there a way to do this?
